title: 3D Spear - From A Minecraft Movie DLC
description: A resourcepack that changes the spear model to the one from the A Minecraft Movie DLC
body:
# **The _A Minecraft Movie DLC_ spear in vanilla**
That resourcepack is made by Nioum, for Mounts of Mayhem update.

![FEATURES](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a878121721f35acb126ff78db905ea7d64591736.png)

💙 Minecraft Movie spear model

💙 Wooden Spear (handheld)

💙 Stone Spear (handheld)

💙 Copper Spear (handheld)

💙 Gold Spear (handheld)

💙 Iron Spear (handheld)

💙 Diamond Spear (handheld)

💙 Netherite Spear (handheld)

![Promo Art](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d09d20e5b204c31ad1176f1f381592895f8728ef.png)

...That's all, have fun!
